universe_definition: Members aged 25-40 in NE or IA with diabetes or hypertension, SMS opted-in, not suppressed, and active with an active enrollment.
primary_slicing_axis: Open preventive care gaps to maximize conversion rate (weight 0.6)
name: High-conversion: Open preventive care gap
sql: SELECT DISTINCT m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name, m.email, m.phone_mobile FROM marketing_ai.members m JOIN marketing_ai.addresses a ON m.address_id = a.address_id JOIN marketing_ai.member_conditions mc ON m.member_id = mc.member_id WHERE m.date_of_birth BETWEEN (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '40 years') AND (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '25 years') AND LOWER(a.state) IN ('ne', 'ia') AND (LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE 'e11%' OR LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE 'i10%') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.care_gaps cg WHERE cg.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(cg.status) = 'open' AND LOWER(cg.measure_category) = 'preventive') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.consent_preferences cp WHERE cp.member_id = m.member_id AND cp.sms_opt_in = TRUE) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.suppression_lists sl WHERE sl.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(sl.channel) = 'sms' AND (sl.expires_at IS NULL OR sl.expires_at > CURRENT_DATE)) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.enrollments e WHERE e.member_id = m.member_id AND e.is_active = TRUE) AND LOWER(m.status) = 'active'
rationale: This bucket targets members with an open preventive care gap, which is the strongest predictor of conversion. They are most likely to schedule an appointment and should be prioritized for outreach.
suggested_treatment: Focus on the urgency of their preventive care need and offer to schedule an appointment immediately.
coverage_note: This bucket set covers the entire universe of members aged 25-40 in NE or IA with diabetes or hypertension, SMS opted-in, not suppressed, and active with an active enrollment. No meaningful sub-population is intentionally excluded.

primary_slicing_axis: Open preventive care gaps to maximize conversion rate (weight 0.6)
name: Medium-conversion: Replied to prior SMS
sql: SELECT DISTINCT m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name, m.email, m.phone_mobile FROM marketing_ai.members m JOIN marketing_ai.addresses a ON m.address_id = a.address_id JOIN marketing_ai.member_conditions mc ON m.member_id = mc.member_id WHERE m.date_of_birth BETWEEN (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '40 years') AND (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '25 years') AND LOWER(a.state) IN ('ne', 'ia') AND (LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE 'e11%' OR LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE 'i10%') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.sms_events se WHERE se.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(se.event_type) = 'replied' AND se.event_timestamp >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '180 days') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.care_gaps cg WHERE cg.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(cg.status) = 'open' AND LOWER(cg.measure_category) = 'preventive') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.consent_preferences cp WHERE cp.member_id = m.member_id AND cp.sms_opt_in = TRUE) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.suppression_lists sl WHERE sl.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(sl.channel) = 'sms' AND (sl.expires_at IS NULL OR sl.expires_at > CURRENT_DATE)) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.enrollments e WHERE e.member_id = m.member_id AND e.is_active = TRUE) AND LOWER(m.status) = 'active'
rationale: Members who have replied to prior SMS messages are more engaged and likely to respond to a new SMS. They should be targeted with a message that acknowledges their engagement and offers a clear call to action.
suggested_treatment: Acknowledge their engagement and offer to schedule an appointment at their convenience.
coverage_note: This bucket set covers the entire universe of members aged 25-40 in NE or IA with diabetes or hypertension, SMS opted-in, not suppressed, and active with an active enrollment. No meaningful sub-population is intentionally excluded.

primary_slicing_axis: Open preventive care gaps to maximize conversion rate (weight 0.6)
name: Low-conversion: Delivered but no interaction
sql: SELECT DISTINCT m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name, m.email, m.phone_mobile FROM marketing_ai.members m JOIN marketing_ai.addresses a ON m.address_id = a.address_id JOIN marketing_ai.member_conditions mc ON m.member_id = mc.member_id WHERE m.date_of_birth BETWEEN (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '40 years') AND (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '25 years') AND LOWER(a.state) IN ('ne', 'ia') AND (LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE 'e11%' OR LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE 'i10%') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.sms_events se WHERE se.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(se.event_type) = 'delivered' AND se.event_timestamp >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '180 days') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.sms_events se WHERE se.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(se.event_type) = 'replied' AND se.event_timestamp >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '180 days') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.care_gaps cg WHERE cg.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(cg.status) = 'open' AND LOWER(cg.measure_category) = 'preventive') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.consent_preferences cp WHERE cp.member_id = m.member_id AND cp.sms_opt_in = TRUE) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.suppression_lists sl WHERE sl.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(sl.channel) = 'sms' AND (sl.expires_at IS NULL OR sl.expires_at > CURRENT_DATE)) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.enrollments e WHERE e.member_id = m.member_id AND e.is_active = TRUE) AND LOWER(m.status) = 'active'
rationale: Members whose SMS messages were delivered but not interacted with are less engaged but still open to outreach. They should be targeted with a message that is clear and concise.
suggested_treatment: Keep the message clear and concise, and offer to schedule an appointment at their convenience.
coverage_note: This bucket set covers the entire universe of members aged 25-40 in NE or IA with diabetes or hypertension, SMS opted-in, not suppressed, and active with an active enrollment. No meaningful sub-population is intentionally excluded.

name: Lowest-conversion: No recent SMS engagement
sql: SELECT DISTINCT m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name, m.email, m.phone_mobile FROM marketing_ai.members m JOIN marketing_ai.addresses a ON m.address_id = a.address_id JOIN marketing_ai.member_conditions mc ON m.member_id = mc.member_id WHERE m.date_of_birth BETWEEN (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '40 years') AND (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '25 years') AND LOWER(a.state) IN ('ne', 'ia') AND (LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE 'e11%' OR LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE 'i10%') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.sms_events se WHERE se.member_id = m.member_id AND se.event_timestamp >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '180 days') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.care_gaps cg WHERE cg.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(cg.status) = 'open' AND LOWER(cg.measure_category) = 'preventive') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.consent_preferences cp WHERE cp.member_id = m.member_id AND cp.sms_opt_in = TRUE) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.suppression_lists sl WHERE sl.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(sl.channel) = 'sms' AND (sl.expires_at IS NULL OR sl.expires_at > CURRENT_DATE)) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.enrollments e WHERE e.member_id = m.member_id AND e.is_active = TRUE) AND LOWER(m.status) = 'active'
rationale: Members with no recent SMS engagement are the least responsive and should be targeted with a message that is gentle and informative.
suggested_treatment: Use a gentle and informative message, and offer to provide more information about preventive care.
